<!-- MY-PAGE:START (auto-generated listing — do not edit by hand) -->
<!-- my-page listing widget. Substituted at write time, scoped under #mypage-list,
     fetches the manifest at runtime so new pages appear without re-editing this markup.
     NOTE: keep this file free of Liquid tokens (percent-brace forms) — when injected
     into a Jekyll page it is wrapped in a raw block, and a stray closing tag here would
     terminate that block early and break the build. -->
<div id="mypage-list">
  <div class="mp-bar">
    <input id="mp-q" type="search" placeholder="Search posts…" autocomplete="off">
    <span id="mp-count" class="mp-count"></span>
  </div>
  <ul id="mp-items" class="mp-items"></ul>
  <div id="mp-empty" class="mp-empty" hidden>No posts yet.</div>
  <div id="mp-pager" class="mp-pager"></div>
</div>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="/p/listing.css?v=76a1e071">
<script src="/p/listing.js?v=76a1e071"></script>
<!-- MY-PAGE:END -->
